nasb.text: Like watchmen of a field they are against her round about, Because she has rebelled against Me,’ declares the Lord.

esv.text: Like keepers of a field are they against her all around, because she has rebelled against me, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 他們四面包圍耶路撒冷， 好像看守田地的人一樣， 因為耶路撒冷背叛了我。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 像看守田园一样包围耶路撒冷， 因为耶路撒冷背叛了我。’ 这是耶和华说的。
